name: ALG
description: A blend of oxycodone with a strong, addictive high. Manufactured as a blue pill, often mimicked via fake tablets.

name: RP10
description: Strong painkillers used by pill poppers to feel a brief period of euphoria and numbness, giving off a delightful high.

name: RP30
description: A 30MG variant of the RP10; similar oxycodone blend with a stronger high.

name: Tesla Pill
description: Street-level MDMA pills, imprinted with a 'Tesla' logo. Usually more potent than base MDMA due to unregulated manufacturing; intense hallucinogenic high.

name: Actavis
description: Top-shelf purple syrup. Rare, expensive, and highly sought after. Smooth body high.

name: Tris Syrup
description: A fan-favorite for lean connoisseurs. Smooth and relaxing with a lasting buzz.

name: Wockhardt
description: Widely available and reliable. Known for putting users into a heavy lean; slows the body.

name: Cocaine
description: A bag of cocaine powder. Delivers a quick, intense burst of energy and confidence, often used before risky plays.

name: Percocet 10
description: Percocet 10mg pill. A moderate painkiller dose with a smooth, calming effect.

name: Percocet 30
description: Percocet 30mg pill. A strong dose that hits harder and lasts longer, popular with heavy users.

name: Quagen
description: Generic purples. Not as potent, but still gets you leaned out. Budget-friendly buzz.

name: Yellow (Tris)
description: A yellow variant of the widely popular Tris, with a stronger concentration. Hard to find, but worth the sensational high.

name: Meth
description: A bag of methamphetamine crystals. Provides a strong stimulant rush, keeping users alert and moving fast.
